calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Sergio Benedetto, Esq. 818-246-7000 Law Offices for Plaintiff.
Renee Rosenblit, Esq. 415-554-3800 for Defendant. (In-person)

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received. The Court calls Line 12 (CGC-25-627154 Reed v County of San Francisco) and Line 13 (CGC-25-627162 Wills v County of San Francisco) together since the cases are identical.

ARGUED.
Ms. Rosenblit agrees with the court's TR.
Mr. Benedetto contests and presents arguments. Counsel contests COA 1 - false imprisonment; not based on parole revocation but based on the remand to state custody under the Penal Code; wrong statute applied for conviction.
Court and Counsel have a discussion.
Ms. Rosenblit responds; argument is new.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to Plaintiff Joseph P. Reed's complaint.

Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
